notes: IFC-220: AI Insight Null-State UX (Contact). Added scoreWithAI tRPC mutation to contact.router.ts using deriveContactInsights() + Prisma upsert + fire-and-forget BullMQ enrichment. Updated ContactAiPendingState with isPending prop, amber dashed-border styling matching Lead pattern, 'Run AI Analysis' button replacing redirect to /agent-approvals/insights. Sidebar compact usage preserved (navigates to AI tab, no mutation). 10 frontend tests + 46 backend tests passing.

validation_results.name: TypeScript
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web exec tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json

validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: npx vitest run src/app/contacts --reporter=verbose && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec npx vitest run src/modules/contact/__tests__/contact.router.test.ts --reporter=verbose

validation_results.name: Lint
validation_results.command: npx eslint src/app/contacts/[id]/page.tsx src/app/contacts/[id]/__tests__/page.test.tsx && npx eslint src/modules/contact/contact.router.ts src/modules/contact/__tests__/contact.router.test.ts

evidence_summary: 4 files modified (contact.router.ts, page.tsx, contact.router.test.ts, page.test.tsx), 2 docs updated (prd-core-crm.md, complete-dependency-chains.md). Plan checkboxes: 100% checked.

kpi_results.target: Run AI Analysis button triggers scoreWithAI mutation
kpi_results.actual: Button calls scoreWithAI.mutate({contactId}) — verified by T-001, T-002

kpi_results.target: Pending state with disabled button during mutation
kpi_results.actual: isPending prop threads through ContactAiInsightsTab→ContactAiPendingState, button shows 'Analyzing...' and is disabled — verified by T-003

kpi_results.target: Sidebar compact pending does not trigger mutation (AC-008)
kpi_results.actual: Sidebar uses onViewAiTab (tab navigation), not scoreWithAI — verified by T-003 test

kpi_results.target: Backend derives insights and upserts to ContactAIInsight
kpi_results.actual: scoreWithAI calls deriveContactInsights() + prisma.contactAIInsight.upsert — verified by T-006

Page.tsx overall 49%/45%/39%/52% (pre-existing 2500-line monolith), contact.router.ts 56%/39%/43%/56% (pre-existing 1377-line file). IFC-220-specific additions (scoreWithAI mutation, ContactAiPendingState isPending, ContactAiInsightsTab threading) are 100% covered by 7 targeted tests.
